name: BuyWhere
description: Agent-native product catalog for Singapore — search, compare, discover deals across 1,000+ merchants.
longDescription:
BuyWhere provides 5 MCP tools for AI agents to access structured Singapore commerce data in real-time. Search products, compare prices across Shopee/Lazada/Amazon SG/50+ merchants, and discover deals — all through the Model Context Protocol.

Key differentiators:
- 1M+ products from 50+ Singapore merchants, normalized and structured
- Real-time pricing — no stale data, prices reflect current market
- Agent-optimized responses — structured JSON designed for LLM consumption
- Zero scraping — BuyWhere handles data collection, agents just query
